message:
feat(daemon): enhance core infrastructure with active build tracking

Significantly improves daemon observability with active build tracking,
enhanced configuration, and improved health monitoring.

Build history enhancements (history.rs):
- ActiveBuildState struct for in-flight build tracking
- HashMap of active builds indexed by build ID
- start_active_build(): Register new build with metadata
- complete_active_build(): Move from active to history
- cancel_active_build(): Handle build cancellation/timeout
- get_active_builds(): List all in-progress builds
- Build state includes: id, project, worker, command, started_at,
  hook_pid, slots, location

Health improvements (health.rs):
- Enhanced readiness checks with active build awareness
- Worker availability verification
- Telemetry freshness checks

Configuration (config.rs):
- Self-test configuration section
- Telemetry storage settings
- Alert configuration defaults

Main daemon (main.rs):
- EventBus initialization and wiring
- AlertManager setup
- BenchmarkQueue initialization
- TelemetryStorage integration
- Graceful shutdown with active build cleanup
- Enhanced startup logging

Workers module (workers.rs):
- Alert manager integration for status transitions
- Circuit breaker alert notifications

Metrics (metrics/mod.rs):
- Active build count gauge
- Build duration histogram

These changes enable the TUI and web dashboard to display currently
running builds with real-time progress information.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
